project_name: ALT Linux CIS Ansible for OT
task_selection_rule: lowest priority task with passes=false and all dependencies passes=true
completion_rule: passes=true only when technical_passes=true and engineer_approval_status is approved or not_required

tasks.title: Bootstrap ALT Linux CIS Ansible project governance and structure
tasks.comments: Initial PRD, progress log, mirrored repository skeleton, offline assumptions, placeholder scope and required-information files created. No CIS controls implemented. PRD, YAML, and placeholder JSON validation passed locally; ansible-playbook is not installed in this workstation, so Ansible syntax-check is deferred to an environment with Ansible available.

tasks.title: Extract authoritative CIS control scope from linux_cis.xlsx
tasks.comments: This task locks the project scope. No controls outside linux_cis.xlsx may be implemented. Completed earlier in this repository and retained as explicit scope-lock governance task.

tasks.title: Extract and normalize linux_cis.xlsx authoritative control scope
tasks.comments: Extracted authoritative linux_cis.xlsx dotted scope rows into normalized JSON/YAML. Preserved exact sheet names, row numbers, CIS IDs, raw status values, raw title cells, raw extra cells, and raw populated cells. Classified 265 controls and 54 group headers. Blank control statuses normalize to needs_scope_clarification; manua/manula normalize to manual while status_from_excel remains unchanged. JSON/YAML/PRD validation passed locally.

tasks.title: Normalize extracted scope schema for downstream consumers
tasks.comments: Reworked extracted scope into canonical top-level metadata/sheets/controls/group_headers schema before ALT-0003 and ALT-0004 consume it. Preserved exact sheet names, sheet indexes, row numbers, CIS IDs/titles, raw status typos, normalized statuses, raw extra cells, audit hints, comments, and OT-safe remediation defaults. JSON/YAML/PRD validation passed locally.

tasks.title: Enforce exact canonical control scope schema parity
tasks.comments: Rewrote scope artifacts directly from linux_cis.xlsx with exact top-level, metadata, sheet, and record key parity. Removed non-canonical raw title/raw cell fields. Normalized blank control statuses to needs_scope_clarification, manua/manula to manual, and implementation_class values to manual_review, needs_scope_clarification, automated_candidate, or group_header. JSON/YAML/PRD/canonical schema validation passed locally.

tasks.title: Enforce canonical control scope schema parity
tasks.comments: Rewrote extracted scope to exact canonical schema and deterministic record field types for cross-project parity. No CIS controls implemented.

tasks.title: Map scripts_summary.docx logic to extracted linux_cis.xlsx scope
tasks.comments: Mapped scripts_summary.docx reference logic to extracted linux_cis scope only. Discovered 17 source scripts, mapped 257 Excel-scoped checks, and recorded 32 group/non-scope candidates as out_of_scope_items. No Bash was executed, no controls were implemented, and Debian/Ubuntu assumptions were flagged for later ALT OS mapping. YAML and PRD validation passed locally.

tasks.title: Normalize scripts_summary mapping schema parity
tasks.comments: Normalized scripts_summary reference mapping to a shared canonical schema. No controls implemented and no Bash executed.

tasks.title: Define required information for offline industrial execution
tasks.comments: Defined offline industrial required-information checklist with required groups, OT safety gates, placeholder template, and clearly marked lab-only examples. No production values or secrets invented. YAML and PRD validation passed locally.

tasks.title: Normalize required-information schema parity
tasks.comments: Normalized required-information files to shared canonical schema with 89 items. No production values added.

tasks.title: Define ALT Linux OS and version mapping files
tasks.comments: Defined ALT Linux OS/version mapping files using canonical-os-map-v1 schema. Included Ansible fact handling for distribution, version, major version, os_family, and kernel; candidate untested ALT p10/p11 version families; apt-rpm/RPM package mapping as candidate_unverified; service/path/command/feature maps for sudo, SSHD, PAM, cron/at, chrony/systemd-timesyncd, journald/rsyslog/auditd, bootloader, filesystem/mount/sysctl, kernel modules, and service inventory candidates. Remediation and package operations are guarded by remediation_enabled, package_install_allowed, local_repository_defined, destructive_changes_allowed, and approval where applicable. YAML and PRD validation passed locally; ansible-playbook load test was not possible because ansible-playbook is not installed in this workstation.

tasks.title: Implement automatic per-host CIS audit checklist output
tasks.comments: Implemented automatic per-host comprehensive checklist generation from linux_cis scope and available audit evidence with chapter grouping, host metadata, and control-level status marks. Artifacts are written per host in reports/lab/<timestamp>/ and reports/lab/latest/ as checklist.json and checklist.md. Only scoped controls are included; non-scoped controls are not implemented. Audit-only/offline-safe defaults preserved. Local PRD and YAML validations passed; ansible-playbook is not installed on this workstation, so Ansible syntax-check/play execution is pending in an Ansible-enabled environment.

tasks.title: Implement machine-level audit result collation and storage format
tasks.comments: Implemented machine-level result collation on top of ALT-0006 host checklist outputs. Added run manifest/index JSON, flattened CSV summary, and markdown run summary generated offline from per-host checklist artifacts under reports/lab/<run_id>/ and reports/lab/latest/. Added optional XML strategy note via built-in junit callback as non-mandatory mode because ansible-playbook is not available in this workstation. No database dependency added; documented as future approval-gated enhancement. Local PRD and YAML validations passed.

tasks.title: Implement repeat-audit change tracking against previous run
tasks.comments: Implemented repeat-audit delta tracking in cis_report using previous per-host checklist baseline from reports/lab/latest before overwrite, with fallback to the most recent timestamped host checklist. Added per-host delta.json and run_delta_summary.json artifacts with changed/new/resolved/unchanged counts per control and offline-safe local storage only.

tasks.title: Implement audit-only CIS chapter/group SUDO for ALT Linux
tasks.comments: Implemented audit-only SUDO chapter controls 5.2.1-5.2.7 using role-based tasks with per-control registered evidence, changed_when=false, and no remediation actions. Generated reports/lab/SUDO/chapter_report.md with implemented/skipped/manual/blocked/high-risk/offline assumptions/OS tested/commands/evidence/result summary and required engineer-approval line. Local JSON/YAML validation passed; ansible-playbook is not available in this workstation so Ansible syntax-check/play execution remains pending in an Ansible-enabled environment. Finalized after engineer approval task ALT-3001.

tasks.title: Review implemented CIS chapter/group SUDO for ALT Linux
tasks.comments: Completed ALT-2001 review for SUDO with verdict pass. Scope/safety/quality reviewed; temporary defaults in Test/Default Service-Port Baseline section were explicitly flagged and must be replaced with environment-approved allowlists. Validation limitation noted: ansible-playbook missing on this workstation.
